steps.name: reject an unauthenticated collection request
command:
exec 3<>/dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/6333; printf 'GET /collections HTTP/1.1
Host: localhost
Connection: close

' >&3; cat <&3

steps.name: query collections with the configured API key
command:
exec 3<>/dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/6333; printf 'GET /collections HTTP/1.1
Host: localhost
api-key: %s
Connection: close

' "$1" >&3; cat <&3
